summary.validation_reason: At least 80% of nodes and edges matched

node_matches.description_1: ID: UE_Deregistered. Type: state. Description: UE is in 5GMM-DEREGISTERED state, not registered with the network.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: UE_Deregistered. Type: state. Description: UE is in 5GMM-DEREGISTERED state, not registered with the network.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. Type: state. Description: UE has sent a REGISTRATION REQUEST for initial registration and is waiting for a response or performing common procedures (e.g., authentication, security).. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. Type: state. Description: UE has sent a REGISTRATION REQUEST and is waiting for a response (timer T3510 running).. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: UE_Sending_RegComplete. Type: state. Description: UE has received a REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring acknowledgment and is preparing to send the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: UE_Sending_RegComplete. Type: state. Description: UE has received REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring acknowledgment and is preparing/sending REGISTRATION COMPLETE.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: UE_Registered. Type: state. Description: UE has successfully completed the initial registration procedure and is in 5GMM-REGISTERED state.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: UE_Registered. Type: state. Description: UE is successfully registered with the network (5GMM-REGISTERED state).. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: UE_Retry_After_Rejection. Type: state. Description: UE received a REGISTRATION REJECT with a cause requiring a backoff period (T3346) before retrying registration.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: UE_Retry_After_Rejection. Type: state. Description: UE received REGISTRATION REJECT with cause #22 (Congestion) and is waiting for T3346 timer to expire.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: UE_Deregistered_PLMN_Search. Type: state. Description: UE received a REGISTRATION REJECT with a cause requiring PLMN/SNPN reselection.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: UE_Deregistered_PLMN_Search. Type: state. Description: UE received REGISTRATION REJECT with a cause requiring PLMN/SNPN selection and is performing the selection process.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: UE_Waiting_T3511. Type: state. Description: UE is waiting for timer T3511 to expire after a T3510 timeout before retrying registration (attempt < 5).. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: UE_Waiting_T3511. Type: state. Description: UE experienced T3510 timeout (retries < 5) and is waiting for T3511 timer to expire before retrying registration.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: AMF_Idle. Type: state. Description: AMF is idle, not processing any registration procedure for this UE.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: AMF_Idle. Type: state. Description: AMF is idle with respect to this UE's registration procedure.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: AMF_Processing_Initial_Registration. Type: state. Description: AMF has received the REGISTRATION REQUEST and is processing it (e.g., context retrieval, initiating common procedures).. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: AMF_Processing_Initial_Registration. Type: state. Description: AMF has received REGISTRATION REQUEST and is processing it, potentially initiating common procedures.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: AMF_Authenticating_Securing. Type: state. Description: AMF is performing authentication or security mode control procedures with the UE.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: AMF_Authenticating_Securing. Type: state. Description: AMF is performing authentication and/or security procedures with the UE.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: AMF_Waiting_Registration_Complete. Type: state. Description: AMF has sent REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring acknowledgment and is waiting for the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message from the UE (timer T3550 running).. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: AMF_Waiting_Registration_Complete. Type: state. Description: AMF has sent REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring acknowledgment and is waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE (timer T3550 running).. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: AMF_Registered. Type: state. Description: AMF considers the UE successfully registered (either after receiving REGISTRATION COMPLETE or sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT not requiring completion).. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: AMF_Registered. Type: state. Description: AMF considers the UE successfully registered (5GMM-REGISTERED state).. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_REGISTRATION_REQUEST. Type: event. Description: A REGISTRATION REQUEST message is sent by the UE or received by the AMF.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_REGISTRATION_REQUEST. Type: event. Description: REGISTRATION REQUEST message is sent by UE or received by AMF.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_AUTHENTICATION_REQUEST. Type: event. Description: An AUTHENTICATION REQUEST message is sent by the AMF or received by the UE.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_AUTHENTICATION_REQUEST. Type: event. Description: AUTHENTICATION REQUEST message is sent by AMF or received by UE.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_SECURITY_MODE_COMMAND. Type: event. Description: A SECURITY MODE COMMAND message is sent by the AMF or received by the UE.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_SECURITY_MODE_COMMAND. Type: event. Description: SECURITY MODE COMMAND message is sent by AMF or received by UE.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_AUTHENTICATION_RESPONSE. Type: event. Description: An AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE message is sent by the UE or received by the AMF.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_AUTHENTICATION_RESPONSE. Type: event. Description: AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE message is sent by UE or received by AMF.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_SECURITY_MODE_COMPLETE. Type: event. Description: A SECURITY MODE COMPLETE message is sent by the UE or received by the AMF.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_SECURITY_MODE_COMPLETE. Type: event. Description: SECURITY MODE COMPLETE message is sent by UE or received by AMF.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_ReqComplete. Type: event. Description: A REGISTRATION ACCEPT message requiring a REGISTRATION COMPLETE response is sent by the AMF or received by the UE.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_ReqComplete. Type: event. Description: REGISTRATION ACCEPT message requiring REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment is sent by AMF or received by UE.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_NoComplete. Type: event. Description: A REGISTRATION ACCEPT message not requiring a REGISTRATION COMPLETE response is sent by the AMF or received by the UE.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_NoComplete. Type: event. Description: REGISTRATION ACCEPT message not requiring REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment is sent by AMF or received by UE.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_REGISTRATION_REJECT. Type: event. Description: A REGISTRATION REJECT message is sent by the AMF or received by the UE.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_REGISTRATION_REJECT. Type: event. Description: REGISTRATION REJECT message is sent by AMF or received by UE.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_REGISTRATION_COMPLETE. Type: event. Description: A REGISTRATION COMPLETE message is sent by the UE or received by the AMF.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_REGISTRATION_COMPLETE. Type: event. Description: REGISTRATION COMPLETE message is sent by UE or received by AMF.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_T3510_Timeout_Retry. Type: event. Description: Timer T3510 expires at the UE, and the registration attempt counter is less than 5.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_T3510_Timeout_Retry. Type: event. Description: Timer T3510 expires at UE, and registration attempt counter is less than 5.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_T3510_Timeout_Max. Type: event. Description: Timer T3510 expires at the UE, and the registration attempt counter is equal to 5.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_T3510_Timeout_Max. Type: event. Description: Timer T3510 expires at UE, and registration attempt counter is equal to 5.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_T3511_Timeout. Type: event. Description: Timer T3511 expires at the UE.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_T3511_Timeout. Type: event. Description: Timer T3511 expires at UE.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_T3502_Timeout. Type: event. Description: Timer T3502 expires at the UE.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_T3502_Timeout. Type: event. Description: Timer T3502 expires at UE (or its value was zero).. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_T3346_Timeout. Type: event. Description: Timer T3346 expires at the UE.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_T3346_Timeout. Type: event. Description: Timer T3346 expires at UE.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_PLMN_Selection_Complete. Type: event. Description: The UE completes the PLMN/SNPN selection process.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_PLMN_Selection_Complete. Type: event. Description: UE completes the PLMN/SNPN selection process.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_T3550_Timeout_Max. Type: event. Description: Timer T3550 expires at the AMF for the fifth time (max retransmissions).. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_T3550_Timeout_Max. Type: event. Description: Timer T3550 expires at AMF for the 5th time.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_Failure_UE. Type: event. Description: An abnormal case occurs at the UE side during registration (e.g., lower layer failure, transmission failure).. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_Failure_UE. Type: event. Description: An abnormal case occurs at the UE (e.g., lower layer failure, access barring, transmission failure).. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_TAI_Changed. Type: event. Description: The UE's current TAI changes and is no longer in the TAI list received in REGISTRATION ACCEPT, potentially during a failure.. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_TAI_Changed. Type: event. Description: UE detects TAI change after REGISTRATION COMPLETE transmission failure, and new TAI is not in the list.. Properties: {}

node_matches.description_1: ID: E_Failure_AMF. Type: event. Description: An abnormal case occurs at the AMF side during registration (e.g., lower layer failure while waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE).. Properties: {}
node_matches.description_2: ID: E_Failure_AMF. Type: event. Description: An abnormal case occurs at the AMF (e.g., lower layer failure).. Properties: {}

edge_matches.description_1: From: UE_Deregistered. To: E_REGISTRATION_REQUEST. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE in 5GMM-DEREGISTERED state initiates initial registration by sending a REGISTRATION REQUEST message (Subclause 5.5.1.2.2)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: UE_Deregistered. To: E_REGISTRATION_REQUEST. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE in state 5GMM-DEREGISTERED initiates the initial registration procedure by sending a REGISTRATION REQUEST message (e.g., for 5GS services, emergency, SMS, mobility from GERAN/UTRAN, onboarding, disaster roaming, resuming service)..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_REGISTRATION_REQUEST. To: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to attempting registration after sending the REGISTRATION REQUEST and starting timer T3510 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.2)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_REGISTRATION_REQUEST. To: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to attempting registration after sending the REGISTRATION REQUEST and starting timer T3510. Timers T3502 and T3511 are stopped if running..

edge_matches.description_1: From: AMF_Idle. To: E_REGISTRATION_REQUEST. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the AMF receives a REGISTRATION REQUEST message from the UE..
edge_matches.description_2: From: AMF_Idle. To: E_REGISTRATION_REQUEST. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the AMF receives the REGISTRATION REQUEST message from the UE..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_REGISTRATION_REQUEST. To: AMF_Processing_Initial_Registration. Type: condition. Description: AMF transitions to processing the registration upon receiving the REGISTRATION REQUEST..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_REGISTRATION_REQUEST. To: AMF_Processing_Initial_Registration. Type: condition. Description: AMF transitions to processing the request upon receiving the REGISTRATION REQUEST message..

edge_matches.description_1: From: AMF_Processing_Initial_Registration. To: AMF_Authenticating_Securing. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the AMF initiates 5GMM common procedures like authentication and security based on the REGISTRATION REQUEST (Subclause 5.5.1.2.3)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: AMF_Processing_Initial_Registration. To: AMF_Authenticating_Securing. Type: trigger. Description: AMF initiates 5GMM common procedures (e.g., authentication, security) based on information in the REGISTRATION REQUEST..

edge_matches.description_1: From: AMF_Authenticating_Securing. To: E_AUTHENTICATION_REQUEST. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the AMF sends an AUTHENTICATION REQUEST message to the UE as part of the authentication procedure (Subclause 5.5.1.2.3)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: AMF_Authenticating_Securing. To: E_AUTHENTICATION_REQUEST. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the AMF sends an AUTHENTICATION REQUEST message to the UE as part of the authentication procedure..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_AUTHENTICATION_REQUEST. To: UE_Authenticating_Securing. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to handle authentication/security upon receiving the AUTHENTICATION REQUEST..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_AUTHENTICATION_REQUEST. To: UE_Authenticating_Securing. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to authenticating/securing state upon receiving the AUTHENTICATION REQUEST from the AMF..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_SECURITY_MODE_COMMAND. To: UE_Authenticating_Securing. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to handle authentication/security upon receiving the SECURITY MODE COMMAND..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_SECURITY_MODE_COMMAND. To: UE_Authenticating_Securing. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to authenticating/securing state upon receiving the SECURITY MODE COMMAND from the AMF..

edge_matches.description_1: From: UE_Authenticating_Securing. To: E_AUTHENTICATION_RESPONSE. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE sends an AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE message to the AMF..
edge_matches.description_2: From: UE_Authenticating_Securing. To: E_AUTHENTICATION_RESPONSE. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE sends an AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE message to the AMF..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_AUTHENTICATION_RESPONSE. To: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. Type: condition. Description: UE returns to attempting registration after sending the AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE, awaiting further network action..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_AUTHENTICATION_RESPONSE. To: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. Type: condition. Description: UE returns to waiting state (attempting registration) after sending the AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE..

edge_matches.description_1: From: UE_Authenticating_Securing. To: E_SECURITY_MODE_COMPLETE. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE sends a SECURITY MODE COMPLETE message to the AMF..
edge_matches.description_2: From: UE_Authenticating_Securing. To: E_SECURITY_MODE_COMPLETE. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE sends a SECURITY MODE COMPLETE message to the AMF..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_SECURITY_MODE_COMPLETE. To: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. Type: condition. Description: UE returns to attempting registration after sending the SECURITY MODE COMPLETE, awaiting further network action..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_SECURITY_MODE_COMPLETE. To: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. Type: condition. Description: UE returns to waiting state (attempting registration) after sending the SECURITY MODE COMPLETE..

edge_matches.description_1: From: AMF_Authenticating_Securing. To: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_ReqComplete. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the AMF accepts the registration and sends REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring a REGISTRATION COMPLETE response (e.g., due to GUTI reallocation, SOR, ODB, CAG list update, PEIPS, UE Radio Cap ID, Truncated S-TMSI config, UUAA pending, NSSAI update, NSAG info, Alternative NSSAI, On-demand NSSAI) (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: AMF_Authenticating_Securing. To: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_ReqComplete. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the AMF accepts the registration and sends a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that requires a REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment from the UE..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_ReqComplete. To: AMF_Waiting_Registration_Complete. Type: condition. Description: AMF transitions to waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE after sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring completion, starting timer T3550 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_ReqComplete. To: AMF_Waiting_Registration_Complete. Type: condition. Description: AMF transitions to waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE after sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT (requiring complete) and starts timer T3550..

edge_matches.description_1: From: AMF_Authenticating_Securing. To: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_NoComplete. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the AMF accepts the registration and sends REGISTRATION ACCEPT not requiring a REGISTRATION COMPLETE response (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: AMF_Authenticating_Securing. To: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_NoComplete. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the AMF accepts the registration and sends a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that does *not* require a REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_NoComplete. To: AMF_Registered. Type: condition. Description: AMF transitions to registered state after sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT that does not require completion..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_NoComplete. To: AMF_Registered. Type: condition. Description: AMF transitions directly to registered state after sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT (not requiring complete)..

edge_matches.description_1: From: AMF_Authenticating_Securing. To: E_REGISTRATION_REJECT. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the AMF rejects the registration request and sends a REGISTRATION REJECT message (Subclause 5.5.1.2.5)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: AMF_Authenticating_Securing. To: E_REGISTRATION_REJECT. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the AMF rejects the registration request and sends a REGISTRATION REJECT message..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_REGISTRATION_REJECT. To: AMF_Idle. Type: condition. Description: AMF returns to idle state after sending REGISTRATION REJECT..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_REGISTRATION_REJECT. To: AMF_Idle. Type: condition. Description: AMF returns to idle state regarding this UE's registration attempt after sending the REGISTRATION REJECT message..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_ReqComplete. To: UE_Sending_RegComplete. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to sending REGISTRATION COMPLETE upon receiving a REGISTRATION ACCEPT that requires completion (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_ReqComplete. To: UE_Sending_RegComplete. Type: condition. Description: UE resets registration attempt counter, stores received information, and transitions to state for sending REGISTRATION COMPLETE upon receiving an ACCEPT message requiring acknowledgment..

edge_matches.description_1: From: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. To: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_NoComplete. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that does not require a REGISTRATION COMPLETE response (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. To: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_NoComplete. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that does *not* require a REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_NoComplete. To: UE_Registered. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to 5GMM-REGISTERED state upon receiving a REGISTRATION ACCEPT that does not require completion (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_NoComplete. To: UE_Registered. Type: condition. Description: UE resets registration attempt counter, stores received information, and transitions directly to registered state (5GMM-REGISTERED) upon receiving REGISTRATION ACCEPT (not requiring complete)..

edge_matches.description_1: From: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. To: E_REGISTRATION_REJECT. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION REJECT message from the AMF (Subclause 5.5.1.2.5)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. To: E_REGISTRATION_REJECT. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION REJECT message from the AMF..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_REGISTRATION_REJECT. To: UE_Retry_After_Rejection. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to retry state upon receiving REGISTRATION REJECT with 5GMM cause #22 (Congestion) and a valid T3346 value (Subclause 5.5.1.2.5)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_REGISTRATION_REJECT. To: UE_Retry_After_Rejection. Type: condition. Description: UE aborts registration, sets 5GS update status to NOT UPDATED, resets counter, starts timer T3346, and enters state 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.ATTEMPTING-REGISTRATION..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_REGISTRATION_REJECT. To: UE_Deregistered_PLMN_Search. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to PLMN search state upon receiving REGISTRATION REJECT with specific causes requiring PLMN/SNPN reselection (e.g., #11, #73, #74, #75, #76, #78, #80) (Subclause 5.5.1.2.5)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_REGISTRATION_REJECT. To: UE_Deregistered_PLMN_Search. Type: condition. Description: UE sets 5GS update status to ROAMING NOT ALLOWED, deletes context (e.g., GUTI, TAI list), resets counter, stores forbidden PLMN/SNPN/TAI as applicable, and enters state 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.PLMN-SEARCH to perform PLMN/SNPN selection..

edge_matches.description_1: From: UE_Retry_After_Rejection. To: E_T3346_Timeout. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the backoff timer T3346 expires (Subclause 5.5.1.2.5, Cause #22)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: UE_Retry_After_Rejection. To: E_T3346_Timeout. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when timer T3346 expires..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_T3346_Timeout. To: UE_Deregistered. Type: condition. Description: UE returns to deregistered state to potentially re-initiate registration after T3346 expires (Subclause 5.5.1.2.5, Cause #22)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_T3346_Timeout. To: UE_Deregistered. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions back to deregistered state upon T3346 expiry, allowing potential re-attempt of registration if still needed..

edge_matches.description_1: From: UE_Deregistered_PLMN_Search. To: E_PLMN_Selection_Complete. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE completes the PLMN/SNPN selection process according to 3GPP TS 23.122 [5]..
edge_matches.description_2: From: UE_Deregistered_PLMN_Search. To: E_PLMN_Selection_Complete. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE completes the PLMN/SNPN selection process according to 3GPP TS 23.122..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_PLMN_Selection_Complete. To: UE_Deregistered. Type: condition. Description: UE returns to deregistered state on the newly selected PLMN/SNPN, ready to initiate registration..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_PLMN_Selection_Complete. To: UE_Deregistered. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to deregistered state (potentially on a newly selected PLMN/SNPN or remaining in limited service) after completing PLMN/SNPN selection, ready to initiate registration if a suitable cell is found..

edge_matches.description_1: From: UE_Sending_RegComplete. To: E_REGISTRATION_COMPLETE. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE sends the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: UE_Sending_RegComplete. To: E_REGISTRATION_COMPLETE. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE sends the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_REGISTRATION_COMPLETE. To: UE_Registered. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to 5GMM-REGISTERED state after sending the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_REGISTRATION_COMPLETE. To: UE_Registered. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to registered state (5GMM-REGISTERED) after successfully sending the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message..

edge_matches.description_1: From: AMF_Waiting_Registration_Complete. To: E_REGISTRATION_COMPLETE. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the AMF receives the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message from the UE (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: AMF_Waiting_Registration_Complete. To: E_REGISTRATION_COMPLETE. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the AMF receives the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message from the UE..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_REGISTRATION_COMPLETE. To: AMF_Registered. Type: condition. Description: AMF transitions to 5GMM-REGISTERED state upon receiving the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message, stopping timer T3550 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_REGISTRATION_COMPLETE. To: AMF_Registered. Type: condition. Description: AMF stops timer T3550 and transitions to registered state (5GMM-REGISTERED) upon receiving the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message..

edge_matches.description_1: From: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. To: E_T3510_Timeout_Retry. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered upon T3510 timeout when the registration attempt counter is less than 5 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. To: E_T3510_Timeout_Retry. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when timer T3510 expires at the UE..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_T3510_Timeout_Retry. To: UE_Waiting_T3511. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to waiting for T3511 after T3510 timeout (retry case), starting timer T3511 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_T3510_Timeout_Retry. To: UE_Waiting_T3511. Type: condition. Description: UE aborts registration, increments attempt counter, starts timer T3511, and enters state 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.ATTEMPTING-REGISTRATION..

edge_matches.description_1: From: UE_Waiting_T3511. To: E_T3511_Timeout. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when timer T3511 expires (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: UE_Waiting_T3511. To: E_T3511_Timeout. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when timer T3511 expires..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_T3511_Timeout. To: UE_Deregistered. Type: condition. Description: UE returns to deregistered state to restart registration after T3511 expires (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_T3511_Timeout. To: UE_Deregistered. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions back to deregistered state upon T3511 expiry to re-attempt registration if still required..

edge_matches.description_1: From: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. To: E_T3510_Timeout_Max. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered upon T3510 timeout when the registration attempt counter reaches 5 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. To: E_T3510_Timeout_Max. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when timer T3510 expires at the UE..

edge_matches.description_1: From: UE_Waiting_T3502. To: E_T3502_Timeout. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when timer T3502 expires (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: UE_Waiting_T3502. To: E_T3502_Timeout. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when timer T3502 expires (or if its value was initially zero)..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_T3502_Timeout. To: UE_Deregistered. Type: condition. Description: UE returns to deregistered state (potentially initiating PLMN search) after T3502 expires (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_T3502_Timeout. To: UE_Deregistered. Type: condition. Description: UE performs actions defined for T3502 expiry (potentially PLMN selection) and remains in a deregistered state..

edge_matches.description_1: From: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. To: E_Failure_UE. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered by various UE-side failures like lower layer issues, transmission failures, or other abnormal cases during the attempt (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 cases e, k, n)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. To: E_Failure_UE. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered by various UE-internal or lower-layer failures during the registration attempt..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_Failure_UE. To: UE_Deregistered. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions back to a deregistered state following a failure during the registration attempt, potentially after incrementing attempt counter (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 cases c, d, e)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_Failure_UE. To: UE_Deregistered. Type: condition. Description: UE aborts the registration procedure and transitions to a deregistered state (potentially LIMITED-SERVICE or PLMN-SEARCH) following a UE-internal or lower-layer failure..

edge_matches.description_1: From: UE_Sending_RegComplete. To: E_Failure_UE. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered by transmission failure of the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case j)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: UE_Sending_RegComplete. To: E_Failure_UE. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered by transmission failure of the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message indicated by lower layers..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_Failure_UE. To: UE_Sending_RegComplete. Type: condition. Description: UE may return to the state of sending REGISTRATION COMPLETE to retry transmission after failure (implementation specific) (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case j)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_Failure_UE. To: UE_Sending_RegComplete. Type: condition. Description: UE attempts to resend REGISTRATION COMPLETE after a transmission failure..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_Failure_UE. To: E_TAI_Changed. Type: condition. Description: Condition where failure to send REGISTRATION COMPLETE coincides with TAI changing out of the assigned list (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case i)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_Failure_UE. To: E_TAI_Changed. Type: condition. Description: UE detects TAI has changed and is no longer in the assigned TAI list following a REGISTRATION COMPLETE transmission failure..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_TAI_Changed. To: UE_Deregistered. Type: condition. Description: UE aborts initial registration and transitions towards deregistered state to initiate mobility registration update due to TAI change during REG COMPLETE failure (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case i)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_TAI_Changed. To: UE_Deregistered. Type: condition. Description: UE aborts initial registration procedure and initiates mobility registration update due to TAI change after REGISTRATION COMPLETE transmission failure..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_T3550_Timeout_Retry. To: AMF_Waiting_Registration_Complete. Type: condition. Description: AMF retransmits REGISTRATION ACCEPT, restarts T3550, and remains in the waiting state (Subclause 5.5.1.2.8 case c)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_T3550_Timeout_Retry. To: AMF_Waiting_Registration_Complete. Type: condition. Description: AMF retransmits REGISTRATION ACCEPT message, resets and restarts timer T3550, and returns to waiting state..

edge_matches.description_1: From: AMF_Waiting_Registration_Complete. To: E_T3550_Timeout_Max. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered upon the fifth expiry of timer T3550 (max retransmissions reached) (Subclause 5.5.1.2.8 case c)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: AMF_Waiting_Registration_Complete. To: E_T3550_Timeout_Max. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when timer T3550 expires for the 5th time at the AMF..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_T3550_Timeout_Max. To: AMF_Registered. Type: condition. Description: AMF aborts waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE and transitions to registered state after T3550 max timeouts (Subclause 5.5.1.2.8 case c)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_T3550_Timeout_Max. To: AMF_Registered. Type: condition. Description: AMF aborts the registration procedure and transitions to registered state (5GMM-REGISTERED) after T3550 max timeouts..

edge_matches.description_1: From: AMF_Waiting_Registration_Complete. To: E_Failure_AMF. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered by AMF-side failures (e.g., lower layer failure) while waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE (Subclause 5.5.1.2.8 case a)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: AMF_Waiting_Registration_Complete. To: E_Failure_AMF. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered by a lower layer failure at the AMF while waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE..

edge_matches.description_1: From: E_Failure_AMF. To: AMF_Registered. Type: condition. Description: AMF aborts waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE and transitions to registered state following a failure (Subclause 5.5.1.2.8 case a)..
edge_matches.description_2: From: E_Failure_AMF. To: AMF_Registered. Type: condition. Description: AMF locally aborts the registration procedure and transitions to registered state (5GMM-REGISTERED) following a lower layer failure..

unmatched_nodes.description: ID: UE_Authenticating_Securing. Type: state. Description: UE is actively involved in authentication or security mode control procedures initiated by the AMF.. Properties: {}
ID: UE_Waiting_T3502. Type: state. Description: UE is waiting for timer T3502 to expire after reaching the maximum number of registration attempts (T3510 timeout, attempt = 5).. Properties: {}
ID: E_T3550_Timeout_Retry. Type: event. Description: Timer T3550 expires at the AMF, and the retransmission counter is less than 4.. Properties: {}

unmatched_edges.description: From: AMF_Authenticating_Securing. To: E_SECURITY_MODE_COMMAND. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the AMF sends a SECURITY MODE COMMAND message to the UE as part of the security procedure (Subclause 5.5.1.2.3)..

From: UE_Attempting_Initial_Registration. To: E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_ReqComplete. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that requires a REGISTRATION COMPLETE response (e.g., due to GUTI, SOR, ODB, CAG list, PEIPS, UE Radio Cap ID, Truncated S-TMSI config, UUAA pending, NSSAI update, NSAG info, Alternative NSSAI, On-demand NSSAI) (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4)..

From: E_REGISTRATION_REJECT. To: UE_Deregistered. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to a deregistered sub-state (e.g., DEREGISTERED.NO-SUPI, DEREGISTERED.LIMITED-SERVICE, DEREGISTERED.ATTEMPTING-REGISTRATION) upon receiving REGISTRATION REJECT with causes not leading to immediate retry or PLMN search (e.g., #3, #6, #7, #10, #12, #13, #15, #27, #31, #62, #72, #77, #79, #81, #82) (Subclause 5.5.1.2.5)..

From: E_T3510_Timeout_Max. To: UE_Waiting_T3502. Type: condition. Description: UE transitions to waiting for T3502 after T3510 timeout (max attempts reached), starting timer T3502 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c)..

From: AMF_Waiting_Registration_Complete. To: E_T3550_Timeout_Retry. Type: trigger. Description: Triggered upon T3550 timeout when the retransmission counter is less than 4 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.8 case c)..
